titleStmt.title: SII 24.474: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 474. (A.R. No. 94 of 1937-38.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift by Rāmarāja, son of Rāmarāja Jagarāja of Āravīḍu of the villages Pāśāṟu in Valla-nāḍu, a subdivision of Tirupparutti-śīrmai and Sēmbiyaṅkaḷār for conducting festivals in the temple in the month of Vaigāśi. The details of the date, viz., Śaka 1475, Pramādīcha, Mithuna, ba. 10, Monday Rēvatī, correspond regularly to 1553 A.D., June 5, Monday; ·81; ·26.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhammastu . svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirājan rājaparameśvaran śrīvīrapradāpa śrīvīra sadāśivarāyamahārāyar prathuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 7 10 5 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa paridāpi śamvatsarattukku cellum pramādica samvatsarattu mituṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu de[ śamiyum]
somavāramum peṟṟa revati nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅgan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha devar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Uttaradeśam somagulatilakarāna Ātraiyagotrattu Āpastambhasūtrattu yejuśākhāddhyāyiyāna Āṟaiviṭu rāmarāju jakarāj Aāvin
putran rāmarājāven śilāśāsanam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi . Eṉṉuṭaiya Ubhaiyam Āka naṭatti varukiṟa vaiykāci māstaiyil revati nakṣatrattu nāḷ tirukkoṭi Āḻvāṉ Eṟi Aruḷi pūśa nakṣatrattu nāḷ tirttham koṇṭa ruḷumpaṭikku kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa tirunāḷaikku tiruviṭaiāṭṭam Āka cetta tiruppa
rutticīrmai vallanāṭu pācāṟu Ūr 1kku nañcey nilam 10 2 li puñcey nilam m 10 2 li � melpaṭi Ūr centaṟai Uḷkkiṭai Ālampaḷḷam vaṭakāl nañcai nilam 3- li kayaṟṟūr nañcai nilam 4- li Āka nilam 7- li cempiyaṉṅkaḷār Ūr 1- kku nañcai nilam 7- li puñcai nilam 7- li Āka Ūr 2kkum Uḷkiṭai 2- kkum nāṅku E
Uḷppaṭṭa nañcai nilam 2 10 6 li puñcai nilam 10 9 li prākkuppaṭi tāṉamāniyam paṭṭavirutti nāḷatuvaraiyum naṭaṉtuvarukiṟatu nikkiniṉṟa nañcai puñcai nattam paṭukai tiṭar Uḷppaṭa rekaippaṭi poṉ 3 100 5 Inta Ūr 2- kkum Uḷkkiṭai Iraṇ ṭukkum rekaippaṭi poṉ 2 100 5- m koṇṭe Intat tirunāḷ te
Āparaṇam rakṣāpannanattukku poṉ 2 tirumuḷai bīśam palavirai ç2¥ samittu pullukku U 1 muhūrttasambhāviṉai U 2- tirutter Uppaṭām neykiṟa vaṉukku poṉ 1 poṉ 2 1000 tirukkoṭippiṭām vaṇrṇam paṟṟi Eḻutukiṟa paricārikku U 2 poṉ 10ḷa Āka poṉ 1 U 2 poṉ 3 10ḷakku tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl poṉ 10 5
keruṭapratiṣṭaikku Eḷḷu Upa Eḷ Eṇṇai 3 teṉ n=ta paḻam 10 vellam cer 5 Uṭpaṭa vilai 10 2l 3 Iyākacālaik kaṭṭaḷaikku tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāl poṉ 10ḷa poṉ 5 100 tirukkoṭi Āḻvān Eṟi Aruḷukaiyil Amutu ceytaruḷum Appam 2 10kku U 2 campātaḷikai 2kku U 2 perikai
tāḷam keyyikaḷ pokaikku Aṭippirappa poṉ 4 §u perikai tāḷamaṭikka nampiyāṟku parivaṭṭa vilai U 5 Iyākacālaikkaṭṭaḷaikku taḷikai 6 piṟappāṭṭukku taḷikai 4 veḷḷiccampā taḷikai 2 tirukkoṭi Āḻvāṉukku taḷikai 2 tecamuṟttiyaḷukku taḷikai 2 paṇippeṟu taḷikai 2 Āka nāḷ 1kku taḷikai 10 8 Āka nāḷ
10kku taḷikai 100 8 10kku poṉ 10 8 karuvukkum pelikku nāḷ 1- kku Arici 1000 §u Āka nāḷ 10kku Arici 5 100 Uḷḷūrār puṇṇiyāhattukku Arici 1000ndha nāḷ 1kku tirup paḷḷiyaṟaiyil Amutu ceytaruḷum Aṭaikkāy Amutu 6 Ilai Amutu Āka nāḷ 10kku U 3 nāḷ 1- kku cātti Aruḷum kaiy Oliyil 1- kku U 5 Āka nāḷ
10kku kaiy Oliyil 10- kku poṉ 5 nāḷ 1- kku cātti Aruḷum cantaṇappaṭi 10 Āka nāḷ 10kku paṭi 100- kku palam 5 10kku U 8 ceṟkaviṭṭa kuṅkumappū Iṭai 10 pa n=ta poṉ 1 U 5 kaṟpūram Iṭai 10pa kastūri paṇavi ṭai10kku paṇam 4 paṉṉīr cempu nāḷ 1- kku palam 3 Āka nāḷ 10kku palam 3 10kku U 6
Āka parivaṭṭavilai Uṭpaṭa poṉ 9 U 1 Iyākacālaiyil tirumañcaṉattukku cantaṉappaṭi 3 10 2kku palam 10 6kku U 2kku maṇṭapattil cātti Aruḷum nāḷ 1- kku paṉinīr cempu palam 10 5 Āka nāḷ 8- kku palam 100 2 10 kku poṉ 2 pu 4 kastūrit tirunāmat tukku U 10 sāmpaṟāṇittūpattukku pu 1 Āka poṉ 3u 7kku
yākacālai tiruviḷakku ney 2 Omattukku ney Uri tiruppaḷḷiaṟai tiruviḷakku ney ma § tiruvaṉtikkāppu ney Uri Āka nāḷ 1- kku ney 4 10 2 Āka nāḷ pattukku ney 4 10 2kku poṉ 1 pu 6 Āka poṉ 3 10 7 U 4- kku tiruvaraṅkatevanāl poṉ 2 1000000 5 100000nya¥ keṭa100000ndhakku poṉ 3 1000000ḍa Āka
kku 2 10000 4 1000 þ kku vilaippaṭi poṉ 4u 7 Āka poṉ 10 2u 3kku¥ Iraṇṭān tirunāḷ ceraṉāna veḷāṉ tirumaṇṭapattil Ēṟi Aruḷukaiyil maṇṭapam tirukkuttu maṇi viḷakkukku ney ma§ tiruvaṉtikkāppukku ney Uri Āka ney ma§ Urikku U 1 Amutu ceytaruḷum pori Amutu 3 100kku poṉ 1u 2 Atirasam 100 5 10kku
7kku vaṭai 100 5 10kku U 6 pānakam kūṉ 2 10kku pu10 cemattaḷikai 2kku U 6 campāttaḷikai 2¥ kku poṉ 2 cantanampaṭi 2 10kku U 2 pākku veṟṟilaikku U 1 Āka poṉ 6 10 6 I� vākaṉa maṇṭapattil Eṟi Aruḷikaiyil Amutucey taruḷum vaṭai 5 10 1- kku U 2 poṉ 6u 8 kku muṉṟām tirunāḷaikku periyatiru
maṇṭapam melaippattiyil Eṟi Aruḷukaiyil celavu poṉ 6 U 6kku nālāntirunāḷ periya tirumaṇṭapam kiḻaippattiyil Ēṟiaruḷukaiyil celavu 6 U 6(1/2) Añcāntirunāḷ cūṭikkuṭutta nācciyār caṉanatiyil Eṟiaruḷukaiyil celavu poṉ 6pu6(1/2) Āṟāntirunāḷ mutal Āḻvār kovil maṇṭapattil Eṟi Aruḷukai
yil celavu poṉ 6u 6(1/2) Āka poṉ 3 10 3 U 2 tevarkaḷ maṇṭapattil Ēṟi Aruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum nāḷ 1 kku vaṭai 5 10 1 kku U 2 Āka nāḷ 5 kku poṉ 6 Eḻāntiru nāḷaikku tiruccūṟaṇattukku mañcaḷ U 3 vacantaṉukku mañcaḷ vilai pu 9 nācciyār kovilil Eṟi Aruḷukaiyil Amutu ceytaruḷum pori
amutu 3 100kku poṉ 1u 2 Atiracam 100kku U 5 vaṭai 100kku U 4 campātaḷikai 2kku vanta poṉ 2 U 5 Eṭṭāntirunāḷ Ellaikkarai patiṉāṟukāl maṇṭapattil Ēṟi Aruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum pori Amutu 2 100kku U 8 Atiracam 5 10 1kku U [2(1/2)] vaṭai 5 10 1kku U 2 cemattaḷikai 2kku U 6 cantaṉappaṭi 2kku U 2
pākku veṟṟilai U 2 Āka poṉ 2u 2kku Oṉpatān tirunāḷ tirutteril Ēṟi Aruḷi Amutu ceytaru(ma)ḷum cemattaḷikai 2kku U 6 tocai 5 10 1kku U 2 cantanam paṭi 3kku U 3 Āka poṉ 9u 2 pattān tirunāḷ cakkarapāṇattukku tiru mañcaṉam koṇṭaruḷukaiyil celavukkum Amutu ceytaruḷum pori
amutu 3 100kku poṉ 1u 2 Atiracam 100kku U 5 vaṭai 100kku U 4 cemattaḷikai 2kku U 2 Āka poṉ2pu4 Āka poṉ 4 10 2 U 6 tirunāḷ 8- ku Iḷaṉir 1000 2 100- kku U 8 Āka poṉ 4 10 3 U 4 tirunakara cotiṉai vaṭatiruvitiyil Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa nāḷ 10 1- kku paṭitaram nātattukkum cālai vilaikku U 10 pantattukku nāḷ 1- kku ney cūṭam 4(1/2)
Āka nāḷ 10kku neykkuṭam 4 10 5 tirunakara cotaṉaikku ceṉai mutaliyār tiruvitiyil Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil piṭitta pantattukku neykkuṭam 1 Ākakkuṭam 4 10 6 kku kuṭam 1- kku U 8 Āka poṉ 3 10 6 U 8 coṭippiṭitta kūlikku nāḷ 10 1 kku poṉ 4 pantam piṭikka kūlikku nāḷ 10 1kku poṉ 6 U 8 kuṭai piṭitta
kūlikku nāḷ 10 2 kku poṉ 6 tiruppaḷḷi Aṟaikku Eḷ Eṇṇaikkāppu vilai pu 1 Iyākacālaik kaṭṭaḷaikku pākku 5 100 veṟṟilai 6 100 cantaṉam paṭi 5- kku U 2 Āka poṉ 2 10 U 1 tirutteṟku piṭavai vilai poṉ 2 10 4 peḻai vaṭam Iḷavaṭam kayiṟu vilai U 5 Āka poṉ 2 10 6 puru parivaṭṭa vilai
tirutter Aḻakiya pramārāya Irāmacantiṟakku parivaṭṭa vilai poṉ 1 paṇippupaṭikkiṟa tiruppaṇi ceyvāṟku parivaṭṭa vilai U 3 śrīpātam tāṅkuvāṟku parivaṭṭa vilai U 4 tiruppaṇām camaippāṟku parivaṭṭa vilai U 2 kāraḷappāṉukku nellu Aḷavu pari vaṭṭa vilai pu- 2 tirukkoṭi Āḻvāṉ
Eṟi Aruḷap piḷḷaik kayiṟu poṭukiṟa kaiyikkoḷa mutalikku parivaṭṭa vilai U 1 Am nāṭakam Āṭukiṟa Emperumāṉ Aṭiyāṟku U- 2 Ulāp paṭikkiṟavaḷukku U- 2 Ellaik karaiyil tiruveḷaikkāṟarukku U 3 kucavaṟku U- 2 kotta(ta)ḷa pañcāḷat tār 2 kku U- 8 2 viccaṉukku U 4 Āka poṉ 4
poṉ 100 7 10 1 U 6(1/2) nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyāṟku Eṉṉuṭaiya Ubhaiyam Āka Āni māsaiyil Anuṣanakṣatrattu nāḷ naṭatti Inta tirunāḷaikku yākacālaikkaṭṭaḷaikku poṉ 2 100 U 2¥ ntanya(1/2) poṉ 2 100000 4 100u Āka poṉ 5 100(1/2) U 5 nāḷ1kku Amutu ceytaruḷum pori Amutu 100 kku poṉ 1u 2
Atirasam 100 5 10kku U 7(1/2) 7(1/2) vaṭai 100 5 10kku U 6 yākacālaikku taḷikai2* piṟappāṭṭu kku taḷikai 2 maṇṭapattu taḷikai 2 Āka taḷikai 6 poṉ kku3 cantanampaṭi 2 U kku U 4 pākku veṟṟilaikku U 2 tiruvolakkattil paṭikkiṟa cattikai
pantattukkum tātanampimār pantattukkum ney 3 10 2 tirukkuttu maṇiviḷakkukku ney poṉ tiruvantikāppukku ney Uri Āka ney 6 10 2¥ Uri kkupoṉ 1u 1 Iḷanir 100 5 10kku puka Āka nāḷ 1- kku poṉ 4pu6(1/2) Āka nāḷ 7- kkupoṉ 3 10 2 pu5(1/2)
Āka tiruūñcal tirunāḷ celavu poṉ 3 10 3(1/2) Āka tirunāḷ 2- kku celavu poṉ 2 100 5 Inta Ūr Iraṇṭukkum Uḷkiṭai 2- kkum Utaiyam poṉ Iruṉūṟṟuañcum koṇṭe Inta Iraṇṭu tirunāḷum cantrāditya
varaiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 24.474 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
